estimatedAPY().details: currentLiquidityRate is in RAY (1e27, per-second).      Annualized %: rate / 1e27 * ~31.5M seconds ≈ rate / 1e27 * SECS_PER_YEAR      Basis points: multiply by 10_000, divide by 1e27 → divide by 1e23

aToken().notice: aToken (aUSDC) — balance increases automatically as interest accrues

deposit(uint256).notice: Vault sends USDC here, then calls this to supply to Aave

estimatedAPY().notice: Live APY estimate from Aave's on-chain rate

harvest().notice: aUSDC auto-compounds — harvest is a no-op

isActive().notice: Whether the adapter is currently active (not paused)

requiredLockPeriod().notice: Minimum lock period in seconds (0 = instant withdrawal)

setGovernance(address).notice: Update governance (single-step for simplicity; vault uses 2-step)

setVault(address).notice: Update vault address (e.g. after vault upgrade)

totalAssets().notice: aUSDC balance = USDC value including accrued interest

vault().notice: The single vault allowed to call deposit/withdraw

withdraw(uint256,address).notice: Withdraw USDC from Aave and send directly to `recipient`
